shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot in front of a colorful Oh My Zsh terminal prompt surrounded by contributor icons, illustrating community-maintained development.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot in front of a colorful Oh My Zsh terminal prompt surrounded by contributor icons, illustrating community-maintained development.
assets.prompt: Oh My Zsh | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a terminal window showing a colorful Zsh prompt with Oh My Zsh theming. Multiple contributor avatars are visible around the terminal like a constellation. Hatch's expression is warm and curious. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch examining the Oh My Zsh contribution loop — from individual configuration through plugin contribution to automatic distribution for future users.
assets.caption: Hatch examining the Oh My Zsh contribution loop — from individual configuration through plugin contribution to automatic distribution for future users.
assets.prompt: Oh My Zsh | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a simple loop diagram: Developer configures tool → Contributes plugin → Plugin joins distribution → Next developer installs with plugin pre-loaded → Repeat. Each step is a simple icon connected by arrows. Hatch points to the loop's self-sustaining quality. Cream background, no copy. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
